options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: dlc_enabled
options.description: To use this option, you must own the "Reckonin' at Gun Manor" DLC.

options.name: randomize_ghost_coach
options.description:
Randomize the coach to access Gun Manor into the item pool.
This has no effect if the Gun Manor DLC is disabled.

options.name: randomize_goblintongue
options.description:
Randomize the ability to speak Goblintongue into the item pool.
If this is disabled, you will always be able to speak Goblintongue from the start.

options.name: unbreakable_tools
options.description:
Makes it impossible for shovels and pickaxes to break in certain circumstances.
If this is disabled, additional tools will be available for purchase if yours breaks.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Coccyx With A Hole In It
The Best Love Poem Ever Written
Fun Law: Rules For Parlor Games
Get Crackin': A Guide To Modern Safes
Locks And How To Pick Them
A Bunch Of Really Small Guns
A Pile Of Loose Chili Beans
Skull With An Odd Tag On It
Can Of Schmaltz Blue Ribbon x3

options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
